name: Sidekick - Pi
description: When transcription starts, launches Pi as an active live-call companion via `tuple connect`. A bundled extension — the Call Console — follows the call in the background (so Pi stays responsive), shows call state in one plain status block below the editor, keeps the chat de-noised, adapts its cadence to the call's shape (real-time for pairing, quiet check-ins when solo; re-evaluating as people join/leave), collects findings/fact-checks in a /notes browser, and lets you manage watch words and cadence live. Requires a Tuple build whose CLI exposes connect and transcription show.
